scripts.report:dist:bun: vitest bench --run --config vitest.config.dist.ts 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bench-dist-bun.txt && cat /tmp/bench-dist-bun.txt | bun run generate-report.ts 'Bun 1.3 (dist)' --json > ../docs/benchmarks-bun-dist.md && echo '✓ docs/benchmarks-bun-dist.md written'
scripts.report:dist:node: npx vitest bench --run --config vitest.config.dist.ts 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bench-dist-node.txt && cat /tmp/bench-dist-node.txt | bun run generate-report.ts 'Node.js v22 (dist)' --json > ../docs/benchmarks-node-dist.md && echo '✓ docs/benchmarks-node-dist.md written'
scripts.report:dist:deno: deno run -A ../node_modules/.bin/vitest bench --run --config vitest.config.dist.ts 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bench-dist-deno.txt && cat /tmp/bench-dist-deno.txt | bun run generate-report.ts 'Deno (dist)' --json > ../docs/benchmarks-deno-dist.md && echo '✓ docs/benchmarks-deno-dist.md written'
scripts.report:bun: vitest bench --run 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bench-bun.txt && cat /tmp/bench-bun.txt | bun run generate-report.ts 'Bun 1.3' --json > ../docs/benchmarks-bun.md && echo '✓ docs/benchmarks-bun.md + .json written'
scripts.report:node: npx vitest bench --run 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bench-node.txt && cat /tmp/bench-node.txt | bun run generate-report.ts 'Node.js v22' --json > ../docs/benchmarks-node.md && echo '✓ docs/benchmarks-node.md + .json written'
scripts.report:deno: deno run -A ../node_modules/.bin/vitest bench --run 2>&1 | tee /tmp/bench-deno.txt && cat /tmp/bench-deno.txt | bun run generate-report.ts 'Deno' --json > ../docs/benchmarks-deno.md && echo '✓ docs/benchmarks-deno.md + .json written'
